decisions.reasoning: Since both Incineroars are identical and speed-tied, Parting Shot is the safest play to gain momentum, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a teammate that can better handle the matchup.
Since both Incineroars are identical and speed-tied, Knock Off is the safest play to remove the opponent's item and gain information, while keeping momentum neutral.

Calyrex-Ice is at 70% and risks being 2HKOed by Flare Blitz while being slower than Incineroar. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to Intimidate the opponent and safely pivot or check their physical attackers.
Since both Incineroars resist each other's primary STAB moves and are in a speed tie, Parting Shot is the best way to pivot out, gain momentum, and debuff the opponent's next switch-in.

Urshifu-Rapid-Strike threatens an OHKO on Incineroar with Close Combat or a 2HKO with Surging Strikes. Switching to Amoonguss provides a crucial resistance to Water-type moves and allows me to threaten the opponent with Spore or Giga Drain.

Urshifu-Rapid-Strike is a major threat, and Spore is the most effective way to neutralize it immediately. Since Amoonguss survives all of Urshifu's attacks comfortably, putting it to sleep is the highest-value play to gain momentum.

Urshifu-Rapid is currently asleep, and Spore is the most effective way to maintain control or force a switch if they wake up. Since I survive their best attack, staying in to re-sleep or pressure the opponent is the optimal play.
